Fire Bolt.description: Hurl a mote of fire. Ranged spell attack, 1d10 fire damage. Scales at 5th, 11th, 17th level.

Sacred Flame.description: Flame descends on a creature. DEX save or take 1d8 radiant damage. Scales at 5th, 11th, 17th.

Eldritch Blast.description: Beam of crackling energy. Ranged spell attack, 1d10 force damage. Extra beams at 5th, 11th, 17th.

Cure Wounds.description: Heal 1d8 + spellcasting modifier HP. +1d8 per slot level above 1st.

Magic Missile.description: Three darts of force, each dealing 1d4+1. Auto-hit. +1 dart per slot above 1st.

Shield.description: +5 AC until start of your next turn, including against triggering attack. Immune to magic missile.

Healing Word.description: Heal 1d4 + spellcasting modifier HP at range. +1d4 per slot above 1st.

Thunderwave.description: 15-foot cube originating from you. CON save or 2d8 thunder damage and pushed 10 feet. Half on save.

Burning Hands.description: 15-foot cone. DEX save or 3d6 fire damage, half on save. +1d6 per slot above 1st.

Hold Person.description: Target humanoid must WIS save or be paralyzed. Repeat save at end of each turn.

Spiritual Weapon.description: Create floating weapon. Melee spell attack for 1d8 + spellcasting mod force damage. Move 20ft and attack as bonus action.

Fireball.description: 20-foot radius sphere. DEX save or 8d6 fire damage, half on save. +1d6 per slot above 3rd.

Counterspell.description: Counter a spell of 3rd level or lower. Higher level spells require ability check DC 10 + spell level.

Revivify.description: Return creature dead no longer than 1 minute to life with 1 HP. Cannot restore missing body parts.
